reason: Chain of Thought (CoT) is a fundamental reasoning strategy that significantly improves the accuracy of LLM responses across all categories. Investing my current Skill Point here will help ensure I don't lose HP on higher-level doors and will accelerate XP gain in the long run.

Unlocking pe_plan provides a planning block and a reflection call, which will be crucial for higher-level questions. Since I have 1 SP and need more XP to reach the next threshold, investing in a skill that improves accuracy is the best strategy before attempting a Level 3 door.
